title: Here be Dragons
description: Removes the annoying "Experimental Settings" backup screen
body:
![HERE BE DRAGONS](https://utils.notionsmp.org/pph/index.php?text=HERE%20BE%20DRAGONS\&size=10\&color=CC0044)

**Here Be Dragons** is a super small Fabric mod that removes the annoying warning screen that shows up when you open a world with certain datapacks.

If you play with world generation datapacks, or stuff similar to that, you’ve definitely seen this screen. The one that makes you click through just to say “yes I know what I’m doing”. After the tenth time it just gets in the way.

This mod simply skips that screen and loads your world normally.

That’s it. No changes to world data. No changes to datapacks. No hidden behavior. It does not touch gameplay at all. It just removes the popup so you can get into your world faster.

Made mostly for people who regularly use datapacks and are tired of clicking the same confirmation every time.

Install it, forget it exists, enjoy not seeing that screen again.

**Here’s the screen it removes:**
![Here be Dragons screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/137e3462e44a59f9366d43a807d6c4d5981bbbeb_0.webp)
